title: The Tea Party Opens
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Big Mom, Big Mom Pirates, Brûlée, Caesar Clown, Pudding as The wedding ceremony and tea party begin, with Big Mom’s enemies preparing to strike.
scene: The wedding begins under Big Mom’s watch, with hidden assassination plans moving beneath the ceremony.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Now, now...leave all that alone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Look, we've brought you presents, Charlotte!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And some for your daughter, in honor of her wedding today!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Treasure chests! My favorite! () What is hiding inside, I wonder?!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: I brought some too, Linlin.()

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Please, accept mine as well!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mine are rare gifts from the the the the the south!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have shipped my own as well! From the further reaches of the north!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'm positively elated!()

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Thank you, thank you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thank you for all this! Thank you, indeed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'm so happy! :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Speaking of treasure chests!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard you recently obtained the great treasure of the sea floor recently!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: OH? News does reach your ears quite quickly, morgans. Indeed, I did.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The treasure chest passed down in the Royal Lineage of the Deep, from Generation to Generation!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And, for some reason I cannot fathom, Neptune has willingly parted with it, and now it rests here, with me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This is

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The treasure chest of legends itself,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The TAMATE- BAKO!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Oohh! What gravitas! What Pres- Ence!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wonder what in the world is inside!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Along with all the other presents I have received, I will open this

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: During the Grand Banquet after pudding's ceremony! You will all get to see what is inside!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I can't wait!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Father!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: OH? Done already?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The preliminary preparations went off without a hitch!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What's the state of affairs downstairs?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The cooks are currently partying at the banquet being held to commemorate the end of the cult- NARY preparations.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We sealed off all the corridors on our way up here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we lock this door up tight, no one should be able to make it up here for the time being.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've also placed a horned Den-den mushi to block radio transmission.

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: The wedding hall is completely isolated.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Good.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Well done. Go change.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Roger.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ceesar.

dialogue.speaker: Brûlée
dialogue.text: Get the mirror out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Knock Knock

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn it, you oaf! stop calling me that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hmph!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So this is going to be your entrance into the tea party?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, try to enjoy yourselves, scum of the earth! Shurororo!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're pretty scummy yourself, you know... anyway, go hide the mirror somewhere over there! Quickly!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your job is to grab that mirror and fly it into the hall

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As soon as you hear big mom cry out in her strange voice!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That thing is our one and only exit outta here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Try not to get any wild ideas.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not going to betray you now, of all times!

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: Caesar clown?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh no... Bage and the others are definitely planning something!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Glare

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Tea Party Begins storyline with 53 dialogue beats. The wedding and tea party begin, placing Sanji, Pudding, Big Mom, Bege and the Straw Hats on a collision course.
